name_en: M25318 Red Chip. This OnTheGo East West bag features a Monogram Tiles canvas in a slender silhouette, adding a striking look to the By The Pool collection. A pastel Circle logo and Monogram flowers pay homage to a dreamy coastline. The detachable wide strap offers flexible carrying. Dimensions: 25*13*10cm
